articles.title: Rahane: 'When the team is struggling, it is important to show your character'
articles.description: "For these two guys, this is just the beginning" - Ajinkya Rahane, the KKR captain, praises Kartik Tyagi and Anukul Roy for their performances in IPL 2026

articles.title: 'Revenge, spite' driving Schutt in World Cup swansong
articles.description: The Australia pace bowler says the upcoming tournament in England will be her last global event

articles.title: Australia women's coach Shelley Nitschke signs three-year contract extension
articles.description: Will remain in her role until June 2029 during a time when more change is likely

articles.title: Devine intervention brings New Zealand back from the dead
articles.description: Pitch-perfect 87 from veteran rescues team from turmoil at 11 for 4, to square series

articles.title: Shreyas Iyer's maiden IPL ton keeps Punjab Kings in the hunt for playoffs spot
articles.description: The PBKS skipper helped break their six-match losing streak, as they sealed a chase of 200 against a depleted Lucknow Super Giants to breach the top four on the points table again

articles.title: Kohli refuses to shake hands with Head after SRH vs RCB game
articles.description: Virat Kohli and Travis Head had exchanged words earlier during the game, in which SRH beat RCB by 55 runs

articles.title: SRH win big but RCB, GT seal top two spots
articles.description: Fifties from Kishan, Klaasen and Abhishek propelled SRH to a massive score, but RCB ensured their net run-rate stayed good enough to take them to Qualifier 1

articles.title: Babar back for ODIs vs Australia; uncapped Rohail, Minhas and Daniyal called up
articles.description: Shadab Khan and Naseem Shah also returned for three-match series, while Mohammad Rizwan was omitted

articles.title: Bangladesh to tour Zimbabwe for all-format series in June-July
articles.description: Upcoming series will mark Zimbabwe's first home assignment this year, and their first international action since the T20 World Cup

articles.title: Pat Cummins: 'My priority is Australian cricket'
articles.description: Cummins says playing cricket for Australia and the IPL are the main focuses for the "next few years at least"

articles.title: Taijul takes six as Bangladesh complete 2-0 sweep
articles.description: Rizwan's 94 went in vain as Pakistan fell 78 short of their target of 437

articles.title: 'Not looking forward to a specific match' - Pakistan captain Fatima Sana downplays hype around Women's T20 World Cup 2026 clash vs India
articles.description: Fatima Sana, the Pakistan captain, said that her team will give equal importance to every game they play during the Women's T20 World Cup 2026.

articles.title: ‘It is up to CA to keep BCCI happy’ - Mark Taylor slams BBL's plans to stage games in India
articles.description: According to reports, Cricket Australia is considering staging the opening fixture of the next BBL season in India.
